chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 63 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of reference. 22.09.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussin, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2016 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Office note states that the compliance has not been sought since 25.04.2015, however, the discrepancy remains as of date. Even today learned counsel articulated no reason as to why compliance has not been made. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
